hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】“在支持和限制力量之间”：由于美联储加息风险盖过了伊朗停火救济，比特币在 64,000 美元附近停滞不前；【FINANCE】市场预计沃什美联储将比预期更加鹰派；【FINANCE】杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席。

items.title: ‘Between supportive and restrictive forces’: Bitcoin stalls near $64,000 as Fed rate-hike risk overshadows Iran ceasefire relief
items.summary: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as six weeks of ETF outflows, and a hawkish Fed overshadow the U.S.-Iran peace deal.
items.title_zh: “在支持和限制力量之间”：由于美联储加息风险盖过了伊朗停火救济，比特币在 64,000 美元附近停滞不前
items.summary_zh: 随着 ETF 连续六周流出，比特币维持在 64,000 美元附近，鹰派的美联储给美伊和平协议蒙上了阴影。

items.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
items.summary: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's tough talk on inflation Wednesday reverberated through financial markets.
items.title_zh: 市场预计沃什美联储将比预期更加鹰派
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什周三关于通胀的强硬言论在金融市场引起反响。

items.title: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
items.summary: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席
items.summary_zh: 冈拉克表示，沃什的立场降低了过度宽松货币政策的风险，这种政策可能会重新引发通胀并推高长期借贷成本。

items.title: Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026
items.summary: The median projection called for the federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%, a quarter percentage point above the current target range.
items.title_zh: 由于几位成员暗示 2026 年加息，主席沃什放弃给出利率预测
items.summary_zh: 预计联邦基金利率到 2026 年底将达到 3.8%，比当前目标范围高出四分之一个百分点。

items.title: Chairman Warsh drastically alters Fed rate statement. Here's what's changed
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in April.
items.title_zh: 主席沃什大幅改变了美联储的利率声明。这是更改的内容
items.summary_zh: 这是周三联邦公开市场委员会声明与美联储 4 月份上一次政策制定会议后发布的声明的比较。

items.title: Live markets: Strategy buys 520 more bitcoin and raises reserves to $1.4 billion
items.summary: Eased ETF selling and improving risk appetite are being offset by a firmer dollar and cautious institutional flows, leaving bitcoin range-bound, one analyst said.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：Strategy 追加购买 520 枚比特币，并将储备金提高至 14 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 一位分析师表示，美元走强和谨慎的机构资金流动抵消了 ETF 抛售的放缓和风险偏好的改善，导致比特币区间波动。

items.title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
items.summary: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.
items.title_zh: “政权更迭，但戴着丝绒手套”：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
items.summary_zh: 第一个宣布的重大变化预示着一场悄然的革命，成立了特别工作组来重新思考美联储所做的几乎所有事情。

items.title: Alan Greenspan, architect of the modern American economy, dies aged 100
items.summary: As chairman of the Federal Reserve, Alan Greenspan became the world's most high-profile banker.
items.title_zh: 现代美国经济的建筑师艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
items.summary_zh: 作为美联储主席，艾伦·格林斯潘成为世界上最引人注目的银行家。

items.title: Geopolitical relief meets the Warsh Fed: Crypto Week Ahead
items.summary: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 22.
items.title_zh: 地缘政治救济与 Warsh 美联储相遇：加密货币周即将到来
items.summary_zh: 看看 6 月 22 日开始的一周将会发生什么。

items.title: Bank of Korea advances CBDC deposit token initiative to test real-world usage: report
items.summary: South Korea's CBDC pilot project is entering its second phase, where deposit tokens will be integrated into existing banking systems.
items.title_zh: 韩国央行推进 CBDC 存款代币计划以测试实际使用情况：报告
items.summary_zh: 韩国的 CBDC 试点项目正在进入第二阶段，存款代币将被整合到现有的银行系统中。

items.title: Ethereum ‘tax’ debate erupts over proposal to redirect portion of staking rewards to ecosystem funding
items.summary: A post on the Ethereum Research forum proposes letting validators vote to redirect up to 10% of staking rewards to fund public goods.
items.title_zh: 以太坊“税收”辩论因提议将部分质押奖励重新转向生态系统资金而爆发
items.summary_zh: 以太坊研究论坛上的一篇帖子建议让验证者投票将最多 10% 的质押奖励用于资助公共产品。

items.title: Strategy added $35 million in bitcoin, $300 million in cash reserves last week
items.summary: The boost to cash reserves is meant to reassure investors about dividend payments on the company's hard-hit preferred shares, STRC.
items.title_zh: Strategy上周增加了3500万美元的比特币和3亿美元的现金储备
items.summary_zh: 增加现金储备的目的是为了让投资者放心，该公司遭受重创的优先股STRC的股息支付。

items.title: TradFi fund manager Baillie Gifford introduces Solana, Ethereum tokenized fund with BNY
items.summary: Baillie Gifford Enhanced Yield Fund (BAGEY) is denominated in dollars, and gives eligible investors access to an actively managed, short-duration portfolio of public corporate bonds.
items.title_zh: TradFi 基金经理 Baillie Gifford 与 BNY 合作推出以太坊代币化基金 Solana
items.summary_zh: Baillie Gifford 增强收益基金 (BAGEY) 以美元计价，为合格投资者提供主动管理的短期公共公司债券投资组合。

items.title: Bitcoin ETF outflow pain eases just as another headwind gathers strength
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for June 22, 2026
items.title_zh: 随着另一股逆风的增强，比特币 ETF 资金流出的痛苦有所缓解
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 6 月 22 日天气预报

items.title: As bitcoin, altcoin prices gain, derivatives signal skepticism over a sustained rally
items.summary: Analysts noted bitcoin is stuck between key support near $60,000 and resistance around $68,000, and a bearish chart pattern could send prices toward $54,000.
items.title_zh: 随着比特币、山寨币价格上涨，衍生品对持续上涨表示怀疑
items.summary_zh: 分析师指出，比特币陷入 60,000 美元附近的关键支撑位和 68,000 美元左右阻力位之间，看跌图表模式可能会将价格推向 54,000 美元。

items.title: Bank of England backs down on strict stablecoin holding limits, sets $50 billion issuance cap
items.summary: The U.K. central bank abandons retail holding limits for a 40-billion-pound aggregate cap and sweetens yield terms for token issuers ahead of a 2027 market launch.
items.title_zh: 英格兰银行放弃严格的稳定币持有限制，设定 500 亿美元的发行上限
items.summary_zh: 英国央行放弃了 400 亿英镑总上限的零售持有限制，并在 2027 年市场推出之前放宽了代币发行人的收益率条件。

items.title: Taiko halts its Ethereum layer-2 network after a bridge exploit, token dives
items.summary: An attacker forged withdrawal proofs to drain about $1.7 million, the same type of flaw behind this year's biggest bridge hacks. Fast containment kept the damage small.
items.title_zh: Taiko 在桥接漏洞后停止其以太坊第 2 层网络，代币跳水
items.summary_zh: 攻击者伪造提款证明，损失了约 170 万美元，这与今年最大的桥梁黑客攻击背后的缺陷类型相同。快速遏制使损害较小。

items.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy buys another 520 BTC for $35 million, adds to USD reserve despite STRC slide
items.summary: Strategy's total holdings account for more than 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth around $55 billion.
items.title_zh: 尽管 STRC 下滑，Michael Saylor 的策略仍以 3500 万美元购买了另外 520 个 BTC，增加了美元储备
items.summary_zh: Strategy 的总持有量占 2100 万枚比特币供应上限的 4% 以上，价值约 550 亿美元。

items.title: Bank of England drops proposed holding caps for sterling stablecoins, sets £40 billion issuance guardrail
items.summary: The Bank of England proposed a £40 billion systemic stablecoin issuance guardrail and revised backing assets, targeting a 2027 launch.
items.title_zh: 英格兰银行放弃了英镑稳定币的拟议持有上限，设定了 400 亿英镑的发行门槛
items.summary_zh: 英国央行提出了 400 亿英镑的系统性稳定币发行护栏，并修改了支持资产，目标是 2027 年发行。

items.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs log sixth consecutive week of net outflows; analyst says selling wave is exhausting itself
items.summary: US spot bitcoin ETFs saw $227 million in net outflows last week, extending the negative flow streak to six consecutive weeks.
items.title_zh: 现货比特币 ETF 连续第六周出现净流出；分析师称抛售浪潮正在耗尽
items.summary_zh: 上周美国现货比特币 ETF 出现 2.27 亿美元的净流出，将负流延续至连续六周。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 合作伙伴网络简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出合作伙伴网络，投资 1.5 亿美元帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其在现实世界的部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
items.summary: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
items.title_zh: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
items.summary_zh: 艾伦·格林斯潘 (Alan Greenspan) 在四位总统的领导下执掌美联储 19 年，并掌握了被称为 Fedspeak 的混淆艺术。

items.title: U.S. and Iran begin peace talks amid conflicting claims over Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Iran's military said it had closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to continued Israeli military strikes in Lebanon; the U.S. said it remains open.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡主权争议中开始和平谈判
items.summary_zh: 伊朗军方表示，已关闭霍尔木兹海峡，以回应以色列对黎巴嫩的持续军事打击；美国表示仍保持开放。

items.title: The riskiest SpaceX stock trade of all had a big first week
items.summary: SpaceX's IPO did not just mint the biggest debut in market history and a trillionaire, but it also triggered a historic land grab in risky leveraged ETFs.
items.title_zh: 风险最高的 SpaceX 股票交易首周表现强劲
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 的 IPO 不仅创造了市场历史上最大的首次公开募股和万亿富翁，而且还引发了风险杠杆 ETF 的历史性抢滩。

items.title: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
items.summary: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯军队集结威胁被视为夺取乌克兰顿巴斯关键的城市
items.summary_zh: 如果科斯特扬季尼夫卡陷落，俄罗斯军队将能够向乌克兰东部仅存的最后据点推进。

items.title: Schools close as more than half of France under red heat alerts
items.summary: The health minister warns many citizens "will suffer", with temperatures set to peak on Monday.
items.title_zh: 法国一半以上地区处于红热警报状态，学校关闭
items.summary_zh: 卫生部长警告说，许多公民“将遭受苦难”，气温将于周一达到峰值。

items.title: First Round of U.S.-Iran Talks Ends With High Hopes and Big Challenges
items.summary: Mediators reported progress toward reaching a final deal within 60 days. They also said that negotiators had dwelled on issues that were supposed to be settled.
items.title_zh: 第一轮美伊会谈结束，充满希望，挑战巨大
items.summary_zh: 调解员报告了在 60 天内达成最终协议的进展情况。他们还表示，谈判代表已经讨论了本应解决的问题。

items.title: Thousands Are Fleeing Ukraine’s Donbas Strongholds as Russia Pushes Closer
items.summary: While Kyiv’s fortunes have brightened in other ways in the war, Moscow’s forces are raining bombs and drones on “fortress belt” cities like Sloviansk and Kramatorsk.
items.title_zh: 随着俄罗斯逼近，数千人逃离乌克兰顿巴斯据点
items.summary_zh: 虽然基辅的命运在战争中以其他方式变得光明，但莫斯科军队却向斯洛维斯克和克拉马托尔斯克等“堡垒地带”城市投下炸弹和无人机。

items.title: Explosion at Qatar Gas Plant Leaves at Least 54 Injured
items.summary: The blast happened at a key site for natural gas production. The authorities blamed a technical malfunction while operations were being restarted after the U.S.-Israeli war against Iran.
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔天然气厂爆炸造成至少 54 人受伤
items.summary_zh: 爆炸发生在天然气生产的关键地点。当局将此归咎于美以对伊朗战争后恢复运营时出现的技术故障。

items.title: Two Boys Arrested After Deadly School Shooting in the Philippines
items.summary: Three people were killed and seven wounded after two ninth graders opened fire on Monday morning in Tacloban City, the police said.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾致命校园枪击事件两名男孩被捕
items.summary_zh: 警方称，周一早上，独鲁万市两名九年级学生开枪，造成三人死亡、七人受伤。

items.title: MoneyGram becomes Solana validator, expands blockchain payments strategy
items.summary: Solana is now the third blockchain where MoneyGram operates an official validator, alongside Tempo and the Midnight Network.

items.summary_zh: Solana 现在是 MoneyGram 运营官方验证器的第三个区块链，另外两个是 Tempo 和 Midnight Network。

items.title: South Korea’s Toss Bank to test blockchain-based financial infrastructure on Solana
items.summary: Toss Bank and Solana will work on a proof-of-concept for overseas remittances and payments involving stablecoins.
items.title_zh: 韩国 Toss 银行将在 Solana 上测试基于区块链的金融基础设施
items.summary_zh: Toss Bank 和 Solana 将致力于开展涉及稳定币的海外汇款和支付的概念验证。

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
items.title_zh: 使用人工智能帮助医生诊断影响儿童的罕见遗传病
items.summary_zh: 研究人员使用 OpenAI 推理模型来帮助诊断罕见疾病，在之前未解决的病例中识别出了 18 种新的诊断结果。

items.title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
items.title_zh: 从 Hugging Face Hub 到 Strands Agents 和 LeRobot 的机器人硬件

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
items.summary: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 表示，比特币的未来将像智能手机一样具有革命性
items.summary_zh: CoinDesk 的指数和数据总裁向投资者传达了一条信息：不要指望比特币。

items.title: U.K. Live Updates: Starmer Announces Resignation; Burnham Wins Key Endorsement
items.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer stepped down as leader of the governing Labour Party. Andy Burnham, the party’s most popular politician, said he would seek the prime minister’s job and secured the support of a potential rival.
items.title_zh: 英国实时更新：斯塔默宣布辞职；伯纳姆赢得关键支持
items.summary_zh: 总理基尔·斯塔默辞去执政党工党领袖的职务。该党最受欢迎的政治家安迪·伯纳姆表示，他将寻求总理职位并获得潜在竞争对手的支持。

items.title: Mideast Live Updates: Vance Points to Progress After First Round of U.S.-Iran Talks
items.summary: Vice President JD Vance said Iran had agreed to invite U.N. nuclear inspectors back into the country in the first round of negotiations that ended Monday. Iran did not immediately comment.
items.title_zh: 中东实时更新：万斯指出第一轮美伊会谈后取得进展
items.summary_zh: 副总统万斯表示，伊朗已同意在周一结束的第一轮谈判中邀请联合国核检查人员重返该国。伊朗没有立即发表评论。

items.title: Bitcoin price may be headed to $54,000, says analyst who forecast October's all-time high
items.summary: Doctor Profit, a widely followed crypto analyst, says bitcoin is forming a “bear flag” pattern.
items.title_zh: 预测 10 月份历史新高的分析师表示，比特币价格可能会升至 54,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 广受关注的加密货币分析师普利特博士表示，比特币正在形成“熊旗”形态。

items.title: Bitcoin developers want to fix the 'replace this transaction with a higher fee' button. Here's why
items.summary: A helpful feature of speeding up transactions has become redundant and a "fingerprint" for tracking. Developers now want to do away with it.
items.title_zh: 比特币开发者希望修复“用更高的费用替换此交易”按钮。这就是为什么
items.summary_zh: 加速交易的有用功能已经变得多余，并且成为跟踪的“指纹”。开发人员现在希望废除它。

items.title: Bitget enables direct US stock purchases using crypto
items.summary: Bitget launched Stock+, enabling crypto-funded purchases of full and fractional US stocks through regulated brokers.
items.title_zh: Bitget 允许使用加密货币直接购买美国股票
items.summary_zh: Bitget 推出了 Stock+，允许通过受监管的经纪商以加密货币资助购买全部和部分美国股票。

items.title: How Does Tether Make Money? Understanding the Business Model Behind USDT
items.summary: Tether primarily makes money by earning interest on the reserve assets that back USDT, the world’s largest stablecoin. When USDT is minted, Tether receives dollars or equivalent assets and invests most of those reserves in short-term U.S. Treasury bills and other low-risk instrum
items.title_zh: 泰达币如何赚钱？了解USDT背后的商业模式
items.summary_zh: Tether 主要通过支持全球最大稳定币 USDT 的储备资产赚取利息来赚钱。当 USDT 铸造时，Tether 收到美元或等价资产，并将大部分储备投资于短期美国国库券和其他低风险工具

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
items.title_zh: 新的使用情况分析和更新的企业支出控制
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 为 ChatGPT Enterprise 引入了新的支出控制和使用分析，帮助组织充满信心地管理成本并扩展 AI。

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
items.title_zh: 近乎自主的人工智能化学家改善了药物化学中具有挑战性的反应
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Molecule.one 展示了一位近乎自主的 AI 化学家如何使用 GPT-5.4 改进关键的制药反应，从而推进药物化学研究。

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
items.title_zh: LifeSciBench 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 LifeSciBench，这是一个由专家撰写、专家评审的基准，用于评估人工智能系统如何处理现实世界的生命科学研究任务和决策。

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.title_zh: 通过模拟部署来预测发布前的模型行为
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 引入了部署模拟，这是一种在部署前使用真实对话数据预测 AI 模型行为的方法，以提高安全性和评估准确性。

items.title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
items.title_zh: MosaicLeaks：你的研究代理人能保守秘密吗？

items.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
items.title_zh: 是否足够代理？在您自己的工具上对开放模型进行基准测试

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026

items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
items.summary: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股后的平均买家在经历了两天的下滑后几乎陷入困境
items.summary_zh: 周四，SpaceX 股价下跌 7%，至 178 美元，该股交易价格大致与其略低于 180 美元的成交量加权平均价格一致。

items.title: First round of US-Iran talks ends with encouraging progress, mediators say
items.summary: The US-Iran talks began on Sunday in Switzerland, after last week's agreement, which includes a commitment to reach a final deal within 60 days.
items.title_zh: 调解人称第一轮美伊谈判取得令人鼓舞的进展
items.summary_zh: 美国与伊朗的谈判于周日在瑞士开始，上周达成协议，其中包括承诺在 60 天内达成最终协议。

items.title: Trump-backed political outsider wins Colombia election, initial count shows
items.summary: Abelardo de la Espriella appears to have narrowly defeated his rival Iván Cepeda, who says the preliminary count is "not yet official or binding".
items.title_zh: 初步统计显示，特朗普支持的政治局外人赢得了哥伦比亚选举
items.summary_zh: 阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉似乎以微弱优势击败了他的竞争对手伊万·塞佩达，后者表示初步统计“尚未正式或具有约束力”。

items.title: Largest ever cocaine bust in Australia after police raid underground bunker
items.summary: Police seized 2.7 tonnes of cocaine worth an estimated A$816m after searching a property in western Sydney.
items.title_zh: 警方突袭地下掩体后，澳大利亚破获有史以来最大规模的可卡因
items.summary_zh: 警方在搜查悉尼西部的一处房产后，查获了 2.7 吨可卡因，价值估计 8.16 亿澳元。

items.title: Former Kenyan justice minister blocked from entering Uganda, lawyers' body says
items.summary: Martha Karua is a lawyer representing detained Ugandan opposition leader Kizza Besigye who is on trial for treason.
items.title_zh: 律师机构称前肯尼亚司法部长被禁止进入乌干达
items.summary_zh: 玛莎·卡鲁阿（Martha Karua）是被拘留的乌干达反对派领导人基扎·贝西吉耶（Kizza Besigye）的代表律师，他因叛国罪而受审。

items.title: Japan quintuples visa fees in first price hike since 1978
items.summary: Authorities say they do not expect the hikes to have an "immediate impact on inbound tourism".
items.title_zh: 日本签证费自1978年以来首次涨价五倍
items.summary_zh: 当局表示，他们预计涨价不会“对入境旅游业产生直接影响”。

items.title: Late singer Oliver Tree's body returned to US after helicopter crash
items.summary: The 32-year-old California native died whilst on his world tour, ahead of a date in Brazil.
items.title_zh: 已故歌手奥利弗·树 (Oliver Tree) 的遗体在直升机坠毁后返回美国
items.summary_zh: 这位 32 岁的加州人在他的世界巡演途中去世，当时他正准备去巴西约会。

items.title: Three dead in Philippines high school shooting over bullying 'grudge'
items.summary: Police say they believe the attack was motivated by a "grudge" over bullying.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾高中因欺凌“怨恨”而发生枪击事件，三人死亡
items.summary_zh: 警方表示，他们认为这次袭击是出于对欺凌行为的“怨恨”。

items.title: Does This Radio Host Really Know Everyone in Wales?
items.summary: Elis James thinks he has a friend in common with just about everyone else in Wales. Don’t believe him? Give him 60 seconds to prove it.
items.title_zh: 这位电台主持人真的认识威尔士的每个人吗？
items.summary_zh: 埃利斯·詹姆斯认为他和威尔士的其他人都有一个共同的朋友。不相信他？给他60秒的时间来证明这一点。

items.title: Cuba’s Fuel Crisis Brings Schools to a Standstill
items.summary: Cuba’s already struggling schools are ending the academic year early because of a crippling fuel shortage caused by the U.S. oil blockade.
items.title_zh: 古巴的燃料危机导致学校停顿
items.summary_zh: 由于美国石油封锁造成严重的燃料短缺，古巴本已陷入困境的学校将提前结束学年。

items.title: South Korea’s Starbucks Shut Early After ‘Tank Day’ Promotion Debacle
items.summary: All Starbucks stores in South Korea shut early on Monday because of a franchise-wide training instituted in the wake of a disastrous marketing campaign.
items.title_zh: 韩国星巴克因“坦克日”促销失败而提前关门
items.summary_zh: 由于灾难性的营销活动后开展了全特许经营培训，韩国的所有星巴克门店于周一提前关门。

items.title: Abelardo De La Espriella, Trump-Backed Rightist, Headed for Win in Colombia
items.summary: A victory for Abelardo De La Espriella, a lawyer with no previous political experience, would be another win for the right in Latin America.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持的右翼分子阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉 (Abelardo De La Espriella) 有望在哥伦比亚获胜
items.summary_zh: 阿韦拉多·德拉·埃斯普里埃拉（Abelardo De La Espriella）是一位没有任何政治经验的律师，他的胜利将是拉丁美洲右翼的又一次胜利。
